name: NUC: After The Blast
short_description: Try to survive and find your family after a massive Nuclear Power Plant explosion.
detailed_description:
NUC: After The Blast is a game in the loot and survive, where your main objective is to find your family after the nucleer explosion.

Try to find your family and survive.
Try to find your family lost after the explosion

Discord


Explore
Explore the environment and discover new places

Crafting
Craft and use new items.

Features:
  • Good Low-Poly design.
  • Looting.
  • Crafting.
  • Zombies.
  • Amazing musics.
  • Achievements.
  • Saving system
